nodes.name: Webhook — Apply Form Submitted
nodes.notes: Fires from apply.html after successful Supabase insert. Body contains full application data + application_id.

meta.description: Clio — Apply Form. Fires when someone submits apply.html. Claude qualifies the lead (hot/warm/cold), writes a personalized reply, updates applications table in Supabase, sends Telegram alert to MK with full breakdown + suggested reply.
